notes: This sample forces the analysis pipeline to coordinate across multiple tool domains: Ghidra for control flow and function decompilation capa for anti-debug and anti-analysis behavioral rules FLOSS for stack string recovery strings for cleartext indicator extraction YARA for rule-based pattern matching on anti-debug APIs The misleading function names test whether agents reason about actual behavior rather than trusting symbol names.
